initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(pa.ball_control) 
     FROM Player p 
     JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo') 
    - 
    (SELECT AVG(pa.ball_control) 
     FROM Player p 
     JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye') AS difference

SELECT 
  (SELECT AVG(pa.ball_control) 
   FROM Player_Attributes pa 
   JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
   WHERE p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo') 
  - 
  (SELECT AVG(pa.ball_control) 
   FROM Player_Attributes pa 
   JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
   WHERE p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye') AS difference

SELECT 
  (SELECT AVG(pa.ball_control) 
   FROM Player p 
   JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id 
   WHERE p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo') 
  - 
  (SELECT AVG(pa.ball_control) 
   FROM Player p 
   JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id 
   WHERE p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye') AS difference

SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(pa.ball_control) 
     FROM Player p 
     JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo') 
    - 
    (SELECT AVG(pa.ball_control) 
     FROM Player p 
     JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye') AS difference

SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN pa.ball_control END) - AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN pa.ball_control END) AS ball_control_difference
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name IN ('Abdou Diallo', 'Aaron Appindangoye');
